CHANGELOG.html.title: Changelog | Extensions Blob
CHANGELOG.html.summary: Changelog [3.0.1] — 2026-03-25 Changed Merge branch 'docs/migrate-multilingual-structure' into main add multilingual doc structure with en, fr, zh support remove old Documentation folder All notable changes to this package will be documented in this file. The format is based on Keep a Changelog and this project adheres to Semantic Versioning. [3.0.0] - 2026-03-25 Breaking Change Package renamed from games.wayn.blob to wayn.games.extensions.blob. Namespace changed from WAYN.Games.Blob to WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob. Update using directives accordingly. Assembly definitions renamed to WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.Runtime and WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.Tests.Editor. [2.0.1] - 2026-03-19 Added Logo for documentation site. Fixed Broken API Reference link on documentation landing page. [2.0.0] - 2026-03-19 Breaking Change All public types are now under the WAYN.Games.Blob namespace. Add using WAYN.Games.Blob; to consuming code. [1.0.0] - 2023-10-15 Change Update to entities 1.0.16 This is now a requirement for the package to work without having to manually and locally edit the entities package [0.5.0] - 2022-07-01 Change Update to entities 0.51 [0.4.0] - 2022-03-16 Change Update to entities 0.50 Fix Infinite loop in binary search is some cases [0.3.0] - 2021-06-28 Update Revmoved allocator parameter from GetValuesForKey(TKey key) : was defaulted to Temp and used only to allocate the zero size array, now allocator is always None. Fix Memory leak on GetValuesForKey(TKey key) [0.2.1] - 2021-06-11 Add Added tests lost during package conversion Update Harmonisation of naming from WAYN Group to WAYN Games Respect package naming convention for package and assembly definitions Fix Missing com.unity.entities dependency [0.2.0] - 2021-06-06 Update Convert to a package [0.1.0] - 2021-02-05 This is the first release of <wayn.blob>. Short description of this release

api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.BlobHashM.title: Class BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> | Extensions Blob
api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.BlobHashM.summary: Class BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> Fluent builder for constructing a BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue> stored in a blob asset. Accumulates key-value pairs, automatically rehashes when the load factor is exceeded, and produces an immutable BlobAssetReference<T> via CreateBlobAssetReference(Allocator). Inheritance object BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Namespace: WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob Assembly: .dll Syntax public class BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> where TKey : unmanaged, IEquatable<TKey>, IComparable<TKey> where TValue : unmanaged Type Parameters Name Description TKey The key type. Must be unmanaged and implement both IEquatable<T> and IComparable<T>. TValue The value type. Must be unmanaged. Constructors BlobHashMapBuilder(BlobBuilder, int, float) Creates a new builder that will write the hash map into the provided BlobBuilder. Declaration public BlobHashMapBuilder(BlobBuilder bb, int bucketCount = -1, float loadFactor = 0.75) Parameters Type Name Description BlobBuilder bb The BlobBuilder used to allocate the blob data. int bucketCount Initial number of hash buckets. Must be a power of two. Defaults to 16 if set to -1. float loadFactor The ratio of unique keys to bucket count that triggers a rehash. Defaults to 0.75. Methods Add(TKey, TValue) Adds a single key-value pair to the builder. Multiple values can be added for the same key. Triggers an automatic rehash if the load factor is exceeded. Declaration public BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> Add(TKey key, TValue value) Parameters Type Name Description TKey key The key to associate the value with. TValue value The value to store. Returns Type Description BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> This builder instance for method chaining. AddAll(IEnumerable<KeyValuePair<TKey, TValue>>) Adds all key-value pairs from an enumerable collection. Declaration public BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> AddAll(IEnumerable<KeyValuePair<TKey, TValue>> elements) Parameters Type Name Description IEnumerable<KeyValuePair<TKey, TValue>> elements A collection of key-value pairs to add. Returns Type Description BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> This builder instance for method chaining. AddAll(IEnumerator<KeyValue<TKey, TValue>>) Adds all key-value pairs from an enumerator of KeyValue<TKey,TValue> elements. Declaration public BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> AddAll(IEnumerator<KeyValue<TKey, TValue>> elements) Parameters Type Name Description IEnumerator<KeyValue<TKey, TValue>> elements An enumerator yielding key-value pairs to add. Returns Type Description BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> This builder instance for method chaining. CreateBlobAssetReference(Allocator) Finalizes the hash map and creates an immutable BlobAssetReference<T>. After calling this method, the builder should not be reused. Declaration public BlobAssetReference<BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue>> CreateBlobAssetReference(Allocator allocator = null) Parameters Type Name Description Allocator allocator The allocator for the blob asset reference. Defaults to Allocator.Temp. Returns Type Description BlobAssetReference<BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue>> A BlobAssetReference<T> containing the built BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue>.

api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.BlobMulti.title: Struct BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue> | Extensions Blob
api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.BlobMulti.summary: Struct BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue> An immutable multi-value hash map stored in a BlobAssetReference<T>. Supports multiple values per key with O(1) average bucket lookup and binary search within buckets. Built using BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> and intended for read-only access at runtime. Inherited Members ValueType.Equals(object) ValueType.GetHashCode() ValueType.ToString() object.Equals(object, object) object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Namespace: WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob Assembly: .dll Syntax public struct BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue> where TKey : struct, IEquatable<TKey> where TValue : struct Type Parameters Name Description TKey The key type. Must be an unmanaged struct implementing IEquatable<T>. TValue The value type. Must be an unmanaged struct. Fields ValueCount The total number of element in the Map. Declaration public BlobPtr<int> ValueCount Field Value Type Description BlobPtr<int> Methods ContainsKey(TKey) Checks whether the map contains any values for the specified key. Declaration public bool ContainsKey(TKey key) Parameters Type Name Description TKey key The key to look up. Returns Type Description bool true if the key exists in the map; otherwise false. GetValuesForKey(TKey) Returns all values associated with the specified key as a read-only NativeArray<T>. The returned array points directly into the blob data and requires no allocation. Declaration public NativeArray<TValue> GetValuesForKey(TKey key) Parameters Type Name Description TKey key The key whose values to retrieve. Returns Type Description NativeArray<TValue> A NativeArray<T> containing the values for key, or a default (empty) array if the key is not found.

api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.KeyComput.summary: Struct KeyComputation Result of computing a bucket index for a key, containing both the target bucket index and the processed key hash. Inherited Members ValueType.Equals(object) ValueType.GetHashCode() ValueType.ToString() object.Equals(object, object) object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Namespace: WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob Assembly: .dll Syntax public struct KeyComputation Fields bucketIndex The index of the bucket where the key's values are stored. Declaration public int bucketIndex Field Value Type Description int keyHash The processed hash code of the key, with high bits mixed into low bits for better distribution. Declaration public int keyHash Field Value Type Description int

api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.KeyIndex..title: Struct KeyIndex | Extensions Blob
api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.KeyIndex..summary: Struct KeyIndex Stores metadata about a key's values within a hash map bucket. Tracks the key's hash code and the location and count of its associated values in the bucket's values array. Inherited Members ValueType.Equals(object) ValueType.GetHashCode() ValueType.ToString() object.Equals(object, object) object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Namespace: WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob Assembly: .dll Syntax public struct KeyIndex Fields ElementCount The number of values associated with this key. Declaration public int ElementCount Field Value Type Description int FirstIndex The starting index of this key's values in the bucket's WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.BlobHashMapBucket<TKey, TValue>.ValuesArray. Declaration public int FirstIndex Field Value Type Description int KeyHash The computed hash code for this key, used for binary search within a bucket. Declaration public int KeyHash Field Value Type Description int

api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.html.title: Namespace WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob | Extensions Blob
api/WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob.html.summary: Namespace WAYN.Games.Extensions.Blob Classes BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> Fluent builder for constructing a BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue> stored in a blob asset. Accumulates key-value pairs, automatically rehashes when the load factor is exceeded, and produces an immutable BlobAssetReference<T> via CreateBlobAssetReference(Allocator). Structs BlobMultiHashMap<TKey, TValue> An immutable multi-value hash map stored in a BlobAssetReference<T>. Supports multiple values per key with O(1) average bucket lookup and binary search within buckets. Built using BlobHashMapBuilder<TKey, TValue> and intended for read-only access at runtime. KeyComputation Result of computing a bucket index for a key, containing both the target bucket index and the processed key hash. KeyIndex Stores metadata about a key's values within a hash map bucket. Tracks the key's hash code and the location and count of its associated values in the bucket's values array.
